channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-12 11:04 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Robotists are the modern-day Fullmetal Alchemists who turn metal into animated beings.
item.description: Robotists are the modern-day Fullmetal Alchemists who turn metal into animated beings.

item.title: @elonmusk: xAI dropped a killer update to Grok Imagine: now you can straight-up reference a video in your promp...
item.description: xAI dropped a killer update to Grok Imagine: now you can straight-up reference a video in your prompt and it pulls motion, style, angles, everything to make the generated images feel alive and dynamic.

item.title: @elonmusk: This happened last month, but you probably never saw any press about it
item.description: This happened last month, but you probably never saw any press about it

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨TRUMP JUST LAID IT OUT on the SAVE America Act. “We want Voter I.D., we want proof of citizenship… ...
item.description: 🚨TRUMP JUST LAID IT OUT on the SAVE America Act. “We want Voter I.D., we want proof of citizenship… no men playing in women’s sports… no transgender mutilation of our children, very basic things that you wouldn’t even think we’d be talking about...”

item.title: @elonmusk: For the first time in nearly 2,000 years, the Corridor of Commodus, also known as a secret passagewa...
item.description: For the first time in nearly 2,000 years, the Corridor of Commodus, also known as a secret passageway for emperors, is open to the public at the Colosseum in Rome, Italy. Emperors used the path, which runs underneath the iconic landmark, to make a grand entrance into the stadium without having to interact with the audience on the way in. CBS News'@SayChrisLivehas more details.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine. Dangerously addictive. Crisp visuals. Immersive sound. You drift.@Grok
item.description: Grok Imagine. Dangerously addictive. Crisp visuals. Immersive sound. You drift.@Grok

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk on him soon becoming a trillionaire: “It really just represents percentage ownership in co...
item.description: Elon Musk on him soon becoming a trillionaire: “It really just represents percentage ownership in companies that I built. It’s not like it’s sitting in a bank account. The companies are doing lots of useful things, the value of the companies grows, I own a percentage of those companies, and it sums up to that number, which seems high.”

item.title: @elonmusk: The leading BEV-only brand in Singapore in 2026 (January to February 2026) 📷 natfl.x
item.description: The leading BEV-only brand in Singapore in 2026 (January to February 2026) 📷 natfl.x

item.title: @elonmusk: So...@GrokImagine has an epic sense of humor. 🤣 Wait for it... This was the same video prompt I trie...
item.description: So...@GrokImagine has an epic sense of humor. 🤣 Wait for it... This was the same video prompt I tried...7 times. Grok was over it. 💀

item.title: @elonmusk: It worked! DART successfully shifted the orbit of not one, but two asteroids around the Sun after Fa...
item.description: It worked! DART successfully shifted the orbit of not one, but two asteroids around the Sun after Falcon 9 launched the spacecraft in 2021 →nasa.gov/missions/dart/nasas…

item.title: @elonmusk: On the Google Play store Grok has passed over 2 million reviews with 4.8 stars. I've never seen an a...
item.description: On the Google Play store Grok has passed over 2 million reviews with 4.8 stars. I've never seen an app with so many positive reviews.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tech investor Joe Lonsdale states that passing the SAVE Act is non-negotiable. He claims "lots of ch...
item.description: Tech investor Joe Lonsdale states that passing the SAVE Act is non-negotiable. He claims "lots of cheating" is happening behind the scenes and warns that the public is far too naive about the current state of election integrity "We need to fix the voting... people are very naive about why this is true."

item.title: @elonmusk: Macrohard or Digital Optimus is a joint xAI-Tesla project, coming as part of Tesla’s investment agre...
item.description: Macrohard or Digital Optimus is a joint xAI-Tesla project, coming as part of Tesla’s investment agreement with xAI. Grok is the master conductor/navigator with deep understanding of the world to direct digital Optimus, which is processing and actioning the past 5 secs of real-time computer screen video and keyboard/mouse actions. Grok is like a much more advanced and sophisticated version of turn-by-turn navigation software. You can think of it as Digital Optimus AI being System 1 (instinctive part of the mind) and Grok being System 2. (thinking part of the mind). This will run very competitively on the super low cost Tesla AI4 ($650) paired with relatively frugal use of the much more expensive xAI Nvidia hardware. And it will be the only real-time smart AI system. This is a big deal. In principle, it is capable of emulating the function of entire companies. That is why the program is called MACROHARD, a funny reference to Microsoft. No other company can yet do this.
